source: klingon-assistant-data (https://github.com/De7vID/klingon-assistant-data), Apache-2.0 License. Derived from canon Klingon vocabulary compiled by Marc Okrand and the Klingon Language Institute community.

words.definition: face (have the prospect of having to deal with)
toss bat'leth from one hand to the other
be fresh, be just picked (fruit, vegetable)
honor (general, philosophical concept, associated with integrity)
You will be remembered with honor.
An honorable death requires no vengeance.

words.word: batlh potlh law' yIn potlh puS.
words.definition: Honor is more important than life.
A Klingon does not postpone a matter of honor.
Defend the Klingon race with honor.
One does not achieve honor while acting dishonorably.
be comfortable, be feeling prepared, be confident
be uncomfortable, be worried, be hesitant
be sure, be definite, be positive, be certain
type of mineral, bekpuj (orange in color)
end (of an opera, play, story, speech)
mixture of ingredients for producing fermented HIq
If you are afraid to die, you have already died.
If you say the wrong thing, I will kill you.
If you cannot fail, you cannot succeed.
second tone of nonatonic musical scale
May you encounter Kahless in your dreams.
be quite mistaken, be totally wrong
The sword is in the ocean.
To really succeed, you must enjoy eating poison.

words.word: bIQongtaHvIS nItlhejchugh targhmey bIvemDI' nItlhej ghIlab ghewmey.
words.definition: If you sleep with targs, you'll wake up with glob flies.
The blood of the warrior grows cold.
If the qIvon is cold, the blood is hot.
If you must negotiate, watch your enemy's eyes.
If you cannot be shamed, you cannot be honored.
adapt to, get used to, acclimatize to, conform to, become adjusted to
You do not deserve to live.
beginning (of an opera, play, story, speech)
Klingons are born, live as warriors, then die.
The memory of you sings in my blood.
ally with, form an alliance with
a very small bird whose eggs are considered quite tasty

words.word: bortaS bIr jablu'DI' reH QaQqu' nay'.
words.definition: Revenge is a dish which is best served cold.
bird, the most general word for a bird-like creature
concentrate on, focus on, think only about
quality that is similar to what humans call "gall"
Admire the person with dirt under his fingernails.
good news, it's good to hear that
close female friend of a female
area eastward, area towards the east
be official, be authenticated, be authorized, be legitimate
thrust upward with end of bat'leth
top of walking cane or ceremonial cane
How did this happen? What's going on?
How do I use this? What do I do with this?
second, aide (role in Klingon legal system)
a bird noted for its speed
a game that involves precisely aiming a projectile
a species of Klingon bird about which little is known
a small bird which digs up bugs to eat
a bird noted for its song
a bird with a noisy, repetitive cry
unit of weight, mass (approx. 5 lbs or 2.25 kg)

words.word: cheqotlhchugh maHaghbe''a'? cheDuQchugh mareghbe''a'? cheQIHchugh manoDbe''a'?
words.definition: Tickle us, do we not laugh? Prick us, do we not bleed? Wrong us, shall we not seek revenge?
type of animal, rabbit (Klingon animal with long ears)
lose, misplace, be unable to find, lose track of
be empty, be deserted, be uninhabited

stairway leading to a door of a ship, gangplank
close in, get closer, come nearer
be profound, be thorough, be careful, be good, be excellent

solid block of ice, ice cube
people, kin, member of the same group or tribe or clan
throw (a spear) at, hurl (a spear) at
explain clearly to, clarify for, specify for
behave as, act in the manner of
be not attentive, be distracted, lack focus
mixture of animal parts, animal parts mixed together

dish in a restaurant, "catch of the day"
May you die before you are captured.
regard as, view as, consider (treat somebody like)
type of animal, hippopotamus (hippo-like Klingon animal)
sway (aircraft moves to the side without yawing)
a bird characterized by erratic, unpredictable behavior
a bird characterized by erratic, unpredictable behavior

be clear, be transparent, be colourless
veer (to the left or right while traveling or moving)
yaw (aircraft nose points left or right)
surrender (something), relinquish, give away, let go of
cathetus, shorter side of right-angled triangle
opposite side (of an angle in a right triangle)
adjacent side (of an angle in a right triangle)
pedal (foot lever such as for piano)
closet, cupboard, cabinet, fixed storage device

slide sword blade along opponent's blade
use a pigment stick, paint with pigment stick
open entryway (to corridor, tunnel, conduit, Jeffries tube, branch of sewer)
type of animal, sheep (fluffy, woolly, shaggy Klingon animal)
be cruel, be merciless, be brutal
be polite, be civil, be courteous

back away from, back off, get away from
mass, masses, multitude, a very large but indeterminate group of something
be opposite, be antithetical, be contradictory

to be a particular shade of brown
sink for cleaning hands, face, food, etc.
If it's in your way, knock it down.
type of animal, lobster (Klingon animal found in water with a huge claw)

words.word: DujDaj HubtaHvIS Hegh 'e' tul Hoch tlhIngan.
words.definition: To die defending his ship is the hope of every Klingon.
There is nothing shameful in falling before a superior enemy.
meat from midsection of animal, no bones
lurk, lie in wait, lie low
be hectic, be very active, be lively
glance at, take a quick look at
end prematurely (an event, voyage, battle, play, opera, story, song, etc.)
insecure one, one full of self-doubt
be operative, be in effect, be valid
results, outcome, effect, repercussions, consequence, ramification

be transformed, be transmuted, be metamorphosed, be totally altered

fight, battle, do battle, wage war

signal (physical signal, audible or visual usually)

approach, go away from, proceed, come, follow (a course)
fish, most general word for fish-like creature
check, promissory note, IOU note (for monetary transactions)

Only fools laugh while warriors die.
type of animal, weasel-like Klingon creature
be learned, be scholarly, be erudite
be random, be arbitrary, be unpredictable, be fortuitous

retreat perfectly, make a full withdrawal

When a warrior dies, his spirit escapes.
Death is an experience best shared.
It is a good day to die.
Klingons are a proud race, and we intend to go on being proud.
finger (holes, strings of instrument) to vary sound
bird with a long neck and long legs
battle or fight against one's own group

end, last item in a list

teen, teenager, adolescent, youth, young adult
weakling, runt, scrawny one, skinny one
be honored falsely, be falsely honorable

words.word: Hov ghajbe'bogh ram rur pegh ghajbe'bogh jaj.

too many people or things in a place at once, traffic jam
lack, be without, to not have

similarly, likewise, in the same way
sixth tone of nonatonic musical scale
confused prisoner, mixed-up prisoner, mixed-up six
be thick, be dense, be viscous
surge (aircraft suddenly moves forward or backward)

heave (aircraft rising or falling without pitching)

twirl bat'leth, cause bat'leth to rotate

chip (like a potato chip or corn chip)

row or line (of people or things expected to be in motion)

stairway leading to door of a ship
move bat'leth from vertical to horizontal orientation
travel or move a specified or measurable distance or trajectory

words.word: loghDaq Suvrupbogh SuvwI'pu' chaH Hoch SuvwI'pu''e'.
words.definition: In space, all warriors are cold warriors.

a specific position in the martial arts form Mok'bara
maneuver (an aircraft) to be in an attitude

end (of stick, rope, etc.), other end from 'er'In

words.word: nIteb Qob qaD jup 'e' chaw'be' SuvwI'.

flat end of a pigment stick

words.word: noH ghoblu'DI' yay quv law' Hoch quv puS.

words.word: noH QapmeH wo' Qaw'lu'chugh yay chavbe'lu' 'ej wo' choqmeH may' DoHlu'chugh lujbe'lu'.
